ksa_text: Develop and maintain data and AI program plans, including scope definition, data governance frameworks, standards and policies, workforce requirements assessment, and resource allocation strategies.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of program protection planning to include information technology (IT) supply chain security/risk management policies, anti-tampering techniques, and requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-001 (Operational Excellence/Task) scores 0.439 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.439) and is edge_case for the ISO 8000 Data Technician role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for technician-level ISO 8000 Data Technician.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.439), and Operational Excellence handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis confirms Operational Excellence competencies at composite 0.439 are consistent with ISO 8000 Data Technician hiring criteria.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Market evidence supports this competency for ISO 8000 Data Technician. Final decision: include.
